mappings.rationaleAI: Directly addresses the Inca Empire's expansion from the Cusco Valley under Pachacuti (C.1.c), the civil war between Atahualpa and Huascar (C.1.e), Pizarro's conquest in 1533 (C.1.f), and administrative innovations including quipu record-keeping and mit'a labor tribute (C.2.a), while providing a broad overview of Andean civilization's character and achievements (A).
